tweet.text:
Caught up just in time to watch them go up by 10.
🥲🔫

Don’t even watch this video, I have no idea what I’m saying.
But Im weirdly optimistic, 9-2 going into The Game.
Go Blue https://t.co/eTEfPF7sJP
Shout out the boy @natebargatze hosting SNl tonight

First official Fall weather day in Nashville_
Second week of spooktober
First week was our greatest week one of the spook we have ever had.
Get you a seasonal latte and buckle up for week 2 🎃 https://t.co/TRG0eTVOsP

Connor stalions flew on 48 hours notice to come sit down with us on the bus and dove deep into all the allegations revolving the 2023 national champion Michigan wolverines.
- Michigan manifesto - pirated video stolen from Michigan - what other schools are doing what he’s been… https://t.co/vcdrvq72Fj

Fired up to be in Eugene Oregon this weekend to watch the ducks put belt to ass against Ohio State.
Boys will be at @RenniesLanding before the game, come hang and talk some college football.
Hoping to rock a black Marcus Mariota jersey Saturday. https://t.co/HYBmPK1zuZ

Boys are staying strong on Spooktober events this week.
What’s the best Haunted house to go do Friday night in Eugene?
Go Ducks 🎃

Delanie walker pick of the week for spooktober.
Winnie the Pooh blood and honey part 2 🎃
Never seen part 1 https://t.co/1g7qzMwWEs

🐐 @KingHenry_2
https://t.co/MBSXwJnDUM

Update, it’s over 9,000 pages long.
https://t.co/axLsnXQcFu

Locker Room is out NOW.
NFL and college picks for you to do what you want with.
- Game of the week - Trophy game of the week - Rapid Fire - Delanie still out on Jayden Daniel’s
Watch here ⬇️ https://t.co/8rKmmGGPRJ https://t.co/KOJXmuSqpY
Peak bros https://t.co/wcyPwTjFnf

Shout out the boy @JellyRoll615 on his new album OUT NOW.
https://t.co/uFYofEV0OQ https://t.co/exUXBo1Suc
Boys are officially in Oregon, Go Ducks.

Before our flight took off this morning Ohio fans were doingtheir dumb chants.
I pray to whatever god is out there they get their hearts broken this weekend.
Go Ducks
Gotta stay informed when you’re on the road. https://t.co/QhtcExX7Yc

Good morning and happy college game day to all you beautiful people that make college football such a fun atmosphere.
It is Day 12 of Spooktober, my locker room picks are in, Eugene has officially given me a contact high, and my expectations for this northwest atmosphere… https://t.co/0AEoUbfCg6

That man @PatMcAfeeShow has the JUICE.
Had Eugene going nuts. https://t.co/aQQGaow3kG

Lotta Duck fans giving some love from this play from 2017.
Eugene is awesome Go Ducks (Today) and forever Mari🐐a.
https://t.co/ePTw74JTRO
Eugene rips https://t.co/L3ySaIi86k
👀👀 https://t.co/HZDaLmjV1z
Mission accomplished 🫡🎃🦆 https://t.co/kW49CHgvsZ

.@delaniewalker82 appreciation post ahead of Titans Vs Colts today.
🫡🎃
https://t.co/1UQt3qT8T4

Just got home from an awesome weekend in Chicago and Eugene get home just in time for family movie night.
The movie - Hocus Pocus
Day 13 of Spooktober 🎃
.@Shanemgillis took this one to whole new level. https://t.co/qR0XPALFyb
